## Checklist

- [ ] `flake8 src/ tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `black src/ tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if behaviour or conventions changed
- [ ] `docs/openapi.json` regenerated if routes/schemas changed
